body: I've been getting notifications about Tagbot not finding tags: [xref](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/issues/186#issuecomment-2394024120), so I thought I'd try out `lookback` as discussed here: https://github.com/JuliaRegistries/TagBot?tab=readme-ov-file#lookback-period
title: Update TagBot
